difficulty_modifiers.name: Brutal Foes
difficulty_modifiers.effect: Enemy forces are tougher and more resilient than usual
difficulty_modifiers.description: All enemies gain +1 Toughness. This represents facing battle-hardened opponents or genetically enhanced soldiers.

difficulty_modifiers.name: Larger Battles
difficulty_modifiers.effect: Encounter significantly more enemies in each battle
difficulty_modifiers.description: Increase deployment points by 25%. Your crew will face larger enemy forces in every encounter.

difficulty_modifiers.name: Veteran Opposition
difficulty_modifiers.effect: Enemies are more skilled in combat
difficulty_modifiers.description: All enemies gain +1 Combat Skill. Face off against seasoned veterans and crack troops.

difficulty_modifiers.name: Elite Foes
difficulty_modifiers.effect: Replace standard enemies with elite variants whenever possible
difficulty_modifiers.description: 50% of enemies are replaced with elite versions (if available). Significantly increases difficulty and tactical challenge.

difficulty_modifiers.name: Desperate Combat
difficulty_modifiers.effect: Injuries are more severe and frequent
difficulty_modifiers.description: Subtract 2 from all injury table rolls, making serious injuries and death more likely. Medical costs increase.

difficulty_modifiers.name: Scarcity
difficulty_modifiers.effect: Reduced loot and payment from battles
difficulty_modifiers.description: Reduce all credit rewards and loot rolls by 25%. Resources are scarce on the frontier.

difficulty_modifiers.name: High Stakes
difficulty_modifiers.effect: Increased pressure from Rivals and Patrons
difficulty_modifiers.description: +1 to rolls for generating Rivals. Patron time frames reduced by 1 campaign turn (minimum 1). Relationships matter more.

difficulty_modifiers.name: Lethal Encounters
difficulty_modifiers.description: Natural 6s to hit cause +1 additional damage. Combat is deadlier for both sides.

story_mode.name: Story Mode
bonuses: Re-roll one failed critical roll per battle

standard.name: Standard
standard.description: Core game rules with no modifiers

iron_man.name: Iron Man
iron_man.description: Ultimate difficulty with no safety nets
restrictions: Campaign ends if all crew killed

adaptive_difficulty.description: Difficulty adjusts based on player performance
rules: After 3 consecutive victories, enable one random modifier
After 2 crew deaths, disable one active modifier

custom_modifiers.description: Players can create their own difficulty modifiers

template.name: Custom Modifier Name
template.category: Choose: enemy_strength, battle_size, rewards, danger, campaign_pressure
template.effect: Description of what this modifier does
